items.title: Bama, DeBoer reach new 7-year, $87.5M contract
items.dek: The University of Alabama has reached a new seven-year contract with football coach Kalen DeBoer that will pay him $12.5 million per season through Jan. 31, 203
items.body: The University of Alabama has reached a new seven-year contract with football coach Kalen DeBoer that will pay him $12.5 million per season through Jan. 31, 2033.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Man City win to knock Arsenal out of first place
items.dek: Erling Haaland's early goal sent Manchester City to the top of the Premier League with a 1-0 win at Burnley, which sent the Clarets back down to the Sky Bet Cha
items.body: Erling Haaland's early goal sent Manchester City to the top of the Premier League with a 1-0 win at Burnley, which sent the Clarets back down to the Sky Bet Championship.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nuggets on McDaniels' criticism: 'Let them talk'
items.dek: In response to the Wolves' Jaden McDaniels calling them out for being "bad defenders," the Nuggets on Wednesday said "it's part of the rivalry."
items.body: In response to the Wolves' Jaden McDaniels calling them out for being "bad defenders," the Nuggets on Wednesday said "it's part of the rivalry."
items.author: IriLine Desk
